testcase.name: shouldCompleteJobAndPopulateAllTables
testcase.system-out:
Standard Commons Logging discovery in action with spring-jcl: please remove commons-logging.jar from classpath in order to avoid potential conflicts 12:19:18.054 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.springbatchdemo.OrderETLJobIntegrationTest]: OrderETLJobIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 12:19:18.162 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.springbatchdemo.SpringBatchDemoApplication for test class com.example.springbatchdemo.OrderETLJobIntegrationTest

testcase.name: shouldHandleDuplicateCustomerGracefully
